0.q: The IrrE-induced otsAB operon, encodes the two enzymes OtsA (trehalose-6-phosphate synthase) and OtsB (trehalose-6-phosphate phosphatase)... The IrrE-expressing strain accumulated 2.1-fold more trehalose than the control.
IrrE expression increased the transcription levels of trehalose biosynthetic genes (otsBA) and trehalose accumulation in E. coli.

1.q: the ΔdrwH mutant strain showed lower expression and activities of the three ROS scavenging enzymes than did the WT strain after treatment with 50 mM H2O2

2.q: Transcriptome proﬁling further revealed that DRB0118 upregulated photosynthesis-related pathways under drought stress... critical for mitigating oxidative damage.

4.q: the expression of drwH was down-regulated by 2-fold in the ΔirrE mutant background under salt stress

5.q: two genes (dr1998 and drA0259) encoding CAT... were significantly down-regulated in the ΔdrwH mutant strain under oxidative stress

7.q: two genes (drA0145 and drA0301) encoding POD... were significantly down-regulated in the ΔdrwH mutant strain under oxidative stress

9.q: four genes (dr1279, dr1546, dr0644 and drA0202) encoding SOD were significantly down-regulated in the ΔdrwH mutant strain under oxidative stress

10.q: DogH glycoside hydrolase hydrolyzes α-1,4-glycosidic bonds by releasing maltose from starch, thereby increasing the concentration of TreS pathway precursors and trehalose biomass.

11.q: these experiments showed that dogH can specifically respond to osmotic stress signals and play an important role in the osmotic stress response.

12.q: DogH glycoside hydrolase can hydrolyze starch to produce maltose and accumulate a greater substrate concentration for the TreS pathway in D. radiodurans.
